seo_title: How to Turn Your Best AI Prompts into One-Click Tools in Chrome
meta_description: Discover how Skills in Chrome lets you save and remix AI workflows, repeat them instantly, and boost productivity with concrete tools and time savings.
body_html:
With Skills in Chrome, you can turn your best AI prompts into one-click tools and boost productivity.

Discover AI WorkflowsSkills in Chrome lets you discover new AI workflows with just a few clicks.This feature saves time and effort, allowing you to focus on more important tasks.You can also save and remix your favorite workflows for instant reuse.Save and Remix AI WorkflowsFeatureDescriptionSaving WorkflowsYou can save your favorite AI workflows with just a few clicks, making it easy to access them later.Remixing WorkflowsSkills in Chrome also lets you remix your saved workflows, allowing you to create new and innovative solutions.Repeat and Instant ReuseWith Skills in Chrome, you can repeat

and reuse your favorite AI workflows instantly, saving time and increasing productivity.

source.title: Turn your best AI prompts into one-click tools in Chrome
